data.description:
Backlogged 2026-07-22.

CUSTOMIZATION.md documents the config/custom/*.yml override surfaces but only covers the original exemption_types.yml and feature_flags.yml. Add rows to the Quick reference table (and short prose blurbs mirroring the exemption_types section) for the override files that shipped since:

- config/custom/exclusion_types.yml — exclusion priority ordering (#758, merged)
- config/custom/external_exceptions.yml — optional hardship exceptions (#757, merged)
- config/custom/verification_data_sources.yml — data source registry (#756, merged)

Doc-only, no code deps; all three underlying features already merged. Standalone small PR off main.
data.title: Document config/custom override files in CUSTOMIZATION.md
